slots.name: eyebrow
slots.notes: Small label above the headline. e.g. 'Get started now'

slots.name: headline
slots.notes: Strong final message. e.g. 'Realize your potential'

slots.name: subheadline
slots.notes: A single sentence to reduce friction or add value. e.g. 'No credit card required.'

slots.name: background_image
slots.notes: Landscape or nature background image with a color overlay

slots.name: focal_object
slots.notes: Decorative focal object at the edge: potted plant, 3D headphones, coffee cup

slots.name: phone_mockups
slots.notes: Phone mockups showing app interface: Image[]

slots.name: input_fields
slots.notes: Input fields if a form is present (Newsletter/Search/Booking): { placeholder, type }

layout_variants.name: Centered Glassmorphism Card
layout_variants.description: Visual Design (UI Aesthetics): Large banner card (rounded-3xl) set prominently against a dark background. The card uses premium semi-opaque glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-md bg-slate-900/60) with a thin, shimmering border (border border-white/15). A soft, neon green ambient glow floats behind the card. Inside, typography is neatly aligned using `[Heading Font]` for the headline, `[Body Font]` for the subheadline, and `[UI Font]` for buttons. Entrance Animation: Step 1: The card container slides up from below (y: 40px) as the border shimmers with an emerald tint. Step 2: Headline and CTA buttons reveal sequentially within the card. Scroll Reverse: The card container slides down and fades out. Hover: Ambient background glow orbs increase opacity from 10% to 30% for immersive depth.

layout_variants.name: Brutalist Neon & Starburst Shape (Ref 5)
layout_variants.description: Visual Design (UI Aesthetics): Inspired by Ref 5. Bold, artistic layout on a vibrant deep violet background (#5E17EB). A giant, personality-filled lowercase title 'it's your laaaast chance to join us!' in a heavy `[Brutalist Serif Font]` overlaps a bright neon green multi-point starburst shape (Starburst SVG shape, #00FFA3) on the right. Tucked beneath the starburst are two small, flat black oval buttons with white text in uppercase `[UI Font]`. The bottom of the banner displays a thin row of social links in `[Mono Font]`. Entrance & Scroll Animation: On scroll enter, the Starburst shape automatically draws its SVG path (stroke-dashoffset) and rotates slowly. The title slides up with a subtle skew. Scroll Reverse: Starburst shrinks and rotates backward, and the title slides down. Button Hover: Bounces with spring feedback, and the Starburst speeds up its rotation.

layout_variants.name: Mysterious Dark & Light Leak Spotlight (Ref 4)
layout_variants.description: Visual Design (UI Aesthetics): Inspired by Ref 4. Mysterious deep navy background. Visual centerpiece is a stunning, bright blue-white glow (Spotlight Light Leak) spreading across the right third of the banner. A large centered headline 'Realize your potential' in clean, white sans-serif `[Heading Font]` stands out, with a white primary button in `[UI Font]` adjacent to a premium glassmorphic secondary button. Entrance & Scroll Animation: On page scroll, the background light leak translates vertically relative to scroll speed (Scroll-driven Parallax Light Leak) for a dynamic lighting feel. Text and buttons rise smoothly using LineReveal. Scroll Reverse: Glow retreats and dims, and text slides downward. Primary Button Hover: Magnetically attracts to the cursor, and the light leak glows brighter.

layout_variants.name: Cobalt Blue & Floating Geometric Cards (Ref 3)
layout_variants.description: Visual Design (UI Aesthetics): Inspired by Ref 3. High-energy layout featuring overlapping, floating geometric Cobalt Blue (#1A00FF) card blocks on a light background. The angled left card contains text and 2 buttons: a solid white button with blue text and a glassmorphic outline button. The right card contains bold 'Browse our collection...' text in `[Heading Font]`. Cards are overlaid with subtle, bright blue abstract geometric patterns (circles, squares, diagonals). Entrance & Scroll Animation: Geometric cards slide in from the left/right screen edges with offset rotations (translateX, translateY, rotate), creating layered 3D parallax depth. Scroll Reverse: Cards slide back to the edges. Card Hover: Cards rotate flat to 0 degrees, translate along the Z-axis to lift up, and geometric patterns animate smoothly in the background.

layout_variants.name: Minimalist with Focal Object (Ref 2)
layout_variants.description: Visual Design (UI Aesthetics): Modern minimalist layout on a solid pure background (Vibrant Red, White, or Blue). Visual anchor is a large Focal Object (potted plant, 3D headphones, or top-down coffee cup) placed bleeding off a corner edge to create natural depth. Headline text and prominent buttons/input fields are neatly aligned in the center or the opposite corner using `[Heading Font]` and `[UI Font]`. Entrance & Scroll Animation: Focal object fades in and slides gently into the corner edge, while the headline rises with an 80ms stagger. Scroll Reverse: Object and text slide back out of the boundary. Focal Object Hover: Rotates slightly with 3D tilt and bounces with spring feedback.

layout_variants.name: Dual Phone Mockups App Banner (Ref 2)
layout_variants.description: Visual Design (UI Aesthetics): Conversion-driven design for mobile applications. Radiant light blue background. The left side features parallel Dual Phone Mockups, slightly angled to display a polished app UI with soft drop shadows. The right side contains a bold sans-serif headline in `[Heading Font]` and flat black app store download buttons (App Store & Google Play). Entrance & Scroll Animation: The 2 phone mockups slide up from the bottom screen edge out of phase (phone 1 slides first, phone 2 follows after a 100ms delay) for a layered 3D feel. Scroll Reverse: Phones slide down and disappear. Phone Hover: Phones tilt gently tracking the mouse, and the screen display glimmers with reflective light.

layout_variants.name: Booking Search & Image Backdrop (Ref 1)
layout_variants.description: Visual Design (UI Aesthetics): Inspired by Ref 1. Background features an expansive nature landscape softened by a warm terracotta/dark grey overlay. Left side contains the headline 'Travel without limit' in `[Heading Font]` and a light description in `[Body Font]`. Right side contains a glassmorphic signup/search container (glassmorphism input widget) with input field 'Your Passport...' and a flat black search button with a magnifying glass icon (`Q`). Entrance & Scroll Animation: Background image slides with slow parallax (speed: 0.1) for depth. Glassmorphic search box slides smoothly from right to left. Scroll Reverse: Search box slides back right and the background scales slightly down. Input Hover: Input border glows with a soft white light, and the search button bounces with spring feedback.

layout_variants.name: Split Dual-Profile Choice Reveal (Ref 2)
layout_variants.description: Visual Design (UI Aesthetics): Inspired by Lando Norris' 'ON TRACK / OFF TRACK' interface (Ref 2). Perfectly symmetrical split-screen layout. Light ivory background with faint, dashed topographic map lines. Far left features a giant angled product silhouette (e.g. a neon helmet) sliding in. Far right features a large portrait of a customer/user sliding in. Centered text is divided into matching halves: 'ON TRACK' on the left and 'OFF TRACK' on the right, each with a circular neon arrow button. Entrance & Scroll Animation: When scrolled into view, the left product image slides in from the left edge (x: -120px -> 0), the right portrait slides in from the right edge (x: 120px -> 0), and background topographic lines ripple gently. Scroll Reverse: Sidelined images slide back outward. Hover Interaction: Hovering on the left column: (1) Left image scales up slightly (scale: 1.05) with a glowing neon border; (2) Right image dims (opacity: 0.3) to focus attention. Reverses when hovering on the right column.

line_reveal_header.intent: Heading text reveals line-by-line (LineReveal component) on scroll: Splits text into words grouped by actual browser offsetTop for responsiveness, sliding up gently (y: 24px -> 0px) and fading in from opacity 0.1 to 1.0 based on scroll position. Scroll reverse: Slides back down and fades out.

spec.type: gsap ScrollTrigger scrub per offsetTop row

staggered_reveal.intent: Staggered entrance effect for buttons and trust signals revealing from bottom to top.

svg_starburst_draw.intent: Draws SVG lines of the glowing multi-point starburst when scrolled into the viewport.

phone_stagger_slide.intent: Two phone mockups slide vertically up from the bottom edge staggered by 100ms.

light_leak_parallax.intent: Background light leak translates vertically relative to actual scroll speed (0.3 ratio) to create a dynamic light source.

bg_image_parallax.intent: Landscape background image slides with a slow 0.1 parallax ratio on scroll to create background depth.

floating_cards_parallax.intent: Cobalt geometric cards float and slide in from both sides at different rates to create layered 3D depth.

cta_magnetic_spring.intent: On button hover: Button magnetically attracts to the cursor and scales to 1.05x using spring physics.

mouse_3d_tilt_phone.intent: Phone mockup or focal object tilts slightly in 3D based on mouse position.

starburst_spin_hover.intent: On Brutalist card hover: Starburst accelerates its rotation speed for visual excitement.

starburst_spin_loop.intent: Background Starburst rotates slowly clockwise indefinitely using CSS keyframes.

particles_glow_float.intent: Faint tiny particles float up in the background and fade out.

in.description: CTA banner must look visually distinct from the preceding FAQ/pricing sections — utilizing high-intensity colors (Cobalt, Neon Green, Purple, Intense Gradient) or a large background image.

out.description: Footer is immediately adjacent to the CTA banner. The CTA background usually matches the footer preloader or blends into the footer's dark background.

flow.notes: The final conversion focus of the website, always placed directly above the footer.
